subject: Bump lfreleng-actions/github2gerrit-action from 1.0.5 to 1.2.0
commit_message:

entries.message:
Abandoned

Abandoning: superseded by a more recent open Gerrit change targeting a higher version of the same dependency.

Context: A historical bug in lfreleng-actions/github2gerrit-action caused incorrect change correlation when dependabot updated existing PRs in place, leaving multiple stacked open changes for the same dependency. This cleanup resynchronises Gerrit with GitHub state.
